items.name: Steamed Momo (10 pcs)
items.description: Traditional Nepalese dumplings served with delicious tomato and ginger chutney.

items.name: Jhol Momo (10 pcs)
items.description: Steamed momo served with soupy tangy tomato & lemon sauce. Warm or cold.

items.name: C-Momo (10 pcs)
items.description: Deep fried dumplings cooked with capsicum, onion and chef's secret sauce.

items.name: Kothey Momo (10 pcs)
items.description: Half steamed and half pan fried dumplings served with momo sauce.

items.name: Fried Momo (10 pcs)
items.description: Deep fried.

items.name: Sadeko Momo (10 pcs)
items.description: Steamed momo marinated with homemade sauce and spices.

items.name: Tandoori Momo (10 pcs)
items.description: Dumplings cooked in charcoal tandoor oven served with mint sauce.

items.name: Tasty Momo Platter (16 pcs)
items.description: Steamed, fried, kothey and chilli momo (4 each).

items.name: Momo Mixed Platter (12 pcs)
items.description: Steamed momo with chicken, beef and vegetarian (4 each).

items.name: Goat Sekuwa (Boneless)
items.description: Tender goat pieces or succulent chicken thighs marinated overnight in chef's secret marinade then barbequed and served with salad and beaten rice.

items.name: Chhoila (Boneless)
items.description: Char grilled choice of meat tossed with homemade chilli sauce, freshly ground cumin, coriander and spices.

items.name: Buffalo Chilli
items.description: Buffalo meat strip pan fried with ginger, garlic, onion, capsicum and spices.

items.name: Khasi Ko Tass
items.description: Pan fried baby goat. Overnight marinated goat meat slow cooked on hot pan, served with beaten rice and salad.

items.name: Sukuti
items.description: Dry wild buffalo meat pan fry with ginger strips & red chilli, one of the most popular Nepalese delicacies.

items.name: Tandoori Chicken
items.description: Tender chicken marinated in yogurt, herbs, spices and cooked in tandoor served with mint sauce and salad.

items.name: Chicken Tikka (4 pcs)
items.description: Boneless chicken pieces marinated and cooked in tandoor oven served with mint sauce and salad.

items.name: Chicken Lollipop
items.description: Chicken wings marinated overnight with ginger, garlic and spices then deep fried to crispy, served with tomato achar and salad.

items.name: Prawn Poleko
items.description: King prawns marinated in tandoori spices and garlic and cooked in tandoor oven, served with mint sauce and salad.

items.name: Golden Calamari
items.description: Tender calamari marinated in aromatic spices and fire-roasted in a tandoori oven. Served with mint sauce.

items.name: Samosa (2 pcs)
items.description: Home made pastry filled with spiced potatoes served with tamarind chutney.

items.name: Onion Bhaji
items.description: Crispy onion fritters served with tamarind chutney.

items.name: Chatpate
items.description: Popular Nepalese street food famous for tangy and sour taste, chickpeas and puff rice marinated with onion, tomato, cucumber and special sauce.

items.name: Paneer Pokora (6 pcs)
items.description: Cottage cheese deep fried with spices and chickpea.

items.name: Aloo Sadeko
items.description: Nepalese style potato salad, seasoned with spices and sesame seeds.

items.name: Vegetarian Tasting Platter (for 2)
items.description: A selection of samosa, onion bhaji, paneer pokora served with chutney.

items.name: Non-Vegetarian Tasting Platter (for 2)
items.description: A selection of chicken lollipop, chicken tikka, lamb cutlet served with mint sauce.

items.name: Seafood Tasting Platter (for 2)
items.description: A selection of salmon, prawns and calamari served with mint sauce.

items.name: Lamb Cutlet (4 pieces)
items.description: Spring lamb chop marinated in delicate spices and cooked in tandoor oven, served with garlic naan and salad and mint sauce.

items.name: Butter Chicken
items.description: Chicken tikka cooked with tomato, butter, cream and spices.

items.name: Chicken Curry
items.description: Traditional Nepalese style chicken curry.

items.name: Chicken Tikka Masala
items.description: Boneless chicken marinated in masala sauce.

items.name: Chicken Ra Tama
items.description: Boneless chicken slowly cooked in chef's special hot and tangy sauce and tender bamboo shoots.

items.name: Chicken Sizzler
items.description: Recommended by chef. Marinated chicken fillet grilled until golden brown and served on a hot plate with noodles, buttered vegetables and thick curry sauce.

items.name: Chilli Chicken
items.description: Marinated with spices and stir fried with capsicum, onions, chilli and soya sauce.

items.name: Rojan Josh
items.description: Lamb or beef cooked with traditional medium sauce with herbs.

items.name: Korma
items.description: Boneless pieces cooked in fresh cream and cashew gravy.

items.name: Spinach (Palak)
items.description: Boneless pieces cooked in spinach puree and cream.

items.name: Vindaloo
items.description: Boneless pieces cooked with hot chilli sauce.

items.name: Coconut Curry
items.description: Cooked with coconut based sauce flavoured with curry leaves and mustard seeds.

items.name: Bhuna Masala
items.description: Lamb or beef pieces cooked in sauteed capsicum, onions, tomato and herbs.

items.name: Goat Curry
items.description: Recommended by chef. Must try for the meat lovers.

items.name: Fish or Prawn Korma
items.description: Prawn or fish cooked with cashew, cream and spices.

items.name: Fish or Prawn Curry
items.description: Prawn or fish cooked with coconut, mustard seeds, curry leaves and spices.

items.name: Fish or Prawn Vindaloo
items.description: Prawn or fish cooked with hot chilli gravy and touch of vinegar.

items.name: Chilli Prawn
items.description: Marinated with spices and stir fried with capsicum, onions, chilli and soy sauce.

items.name: Tandoori Salmon (2 pcs)
items.description: Marinated salmon cooked in tandoor oven, served with peas pulao rice.

items.name: Aloo Bodi Tama
items.description: Mix of young bamboo shoots, potato and black eyed peas in a delicious tangy onion tomato and garlic sauce.

items.name: Chilli Paneer
items.description: Cottage cheese marinated with spices and stir fried with capsicum, onions, chilli and soya sauce.

items.name: Aloo Gobi
items.description: Potato and cauliflower cooked with tomato, onion and spices.

items.name: Jeera Aloo
items.description: Potato tempered with cumin seeds, tomato, onion, fresh coriander and spices.

items.name: Kadhai Paneer
items.description: Cottage cheese cooked with onion, capsicum and kadhai masala.

items.name: Mix Veg Curry
items.description: Assorted vegetables in a gravy made up with tomato, onion and spices.

items.name: Mix Veg Korma
items.description: Mix vegetable cooked with nuts, cream and spices.

items.name: Palak Paneer
items.description: Cottage cheese in creamy spinach sauce.

items.name: Matar Paneer
items.description: Green peas and paneer in onion and tomato sauce.

items.name: Bhindi Masala
items.description: Okra stir fried with onion, tomato and spices.

items.name: Traditional Nepali Thali
items.description: Served as thali on a traditional Nepali bronze plate and bowl, comes with 1 curry and daal, rice, papad, pickle. Goat replaces the veg curry for non-vegetarian.

items.name: Chowmein
items.description: Nepalese style chowmein cooked with your choice of chicken, buff or vegetable.

items.name: Thukpa
items.description: Nepalese style soup noodles cooked with choice of vegetables, chicken and buffalo meat.

items.name: Biryani
items.description: Basmati rice cooked with chef's special spices served with raita.

items.name: Fried Rice
items.description: Basmati rice cooked with your choice of meat or vegetables.

items.name: Peas Pulao
items.description: Basmati rice tossed with green peas.

items.name: Jeera Steamed Rice
items.description: Basmati rice tossed with cumin seeds.

items.name: Vegetable Banquet (min 4 people)
items.description: Per person. Appetisers: papadums, mint chutney. Entree: samosa, onion bhaji, paneer pokora, dal makhani, kadhai paneer, aloo gobhi, mix veg korma, rice, bread, raita, radish pickle and dessert.

items.name: Non-Vegetable Banquet (min 4 people)
items.description: Per person. Appetisers: papadums, mint chutney. Entree: chicken tikka, chicken lollipop, lamb cutlet, dal makhani, butter chicken, lamb rogan josh, beef korma, rice, bread, raita, radish pickle and dessert.

items.name: Khir
items.description: Slow cooked rice in milk and cardamom.

items.name: Gulab Jamun
items.description: Cottage cheese dumplings.
